title: App Settings- General - Account - Invite to second tenant, UI
scenario: Verify that accepting one tenant invite and declining another via the mobile app correctly updates the account while preserving the accepted tenant info.
steps: Cloud Admin sends two different Lens account invites to the mobile user's email.
Launch the app, go to Poly Lens Menu > General > Account and log in — two new invites should appear.
Tap Accept on one invite — accepted invite disappears, the other remains.
Go to Poly Lens Menu > Support > App — verify tenant info matches the accepted invite.
Go back to General > Account and tap Decline on the remaining invite — declined invite disappears.
Go to Support > App — verify tenant info is unchanged and still matches the accepted invite.
expected: User can accept one invite and decline the other. After accepting, tenant info matches the accepted invite. After declining the remaining invite, tenant info remains unchanged and still matches the accepted invite.
